description_long: This is a tall, bulbous ceramic vase with a narrow neck and a flared rim, featuring a hand-painted design. The front displays a detailed depiction of a robed figure holding a staff, framed by a yellow arch and topped with a black double-headed eagle. The sides are adorned with delicate floral and leafy motifs, interspersed with small orange fruits and a painted scroll or banner. The surface shows visible crackling, suggesting an aged or antique finish. The base is slightly wider and inscribed with text, adding to its decorative appeal. The overall color palette includes cream, yellow, black, green, and orange, with a glossy, glazed finish.
description: A tall, bulbous ceramic vase with hand-painted figures, floral motifs, and a glossy, crackled finish. The front features a robed figure and a double-headed eagle, while the sides display leafy designs and a decorative scroll.
description_view_0: The front view shows the robed figure, yellow arch, and black double-headed eagle, with the base inscription clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the leafy floral motifs and a painted scroll, with less emphasis on the central figure.
description_view_2: The back view is mostly plain, with only faint outlines of the decorative motifs visible and no central figure.
description_view_3: This side view again shows leafy motifs and part of the scroll, with the yellow arch partially visible.
